title: Typing practice
drDigitalIntro: Let's put it all together — letters, numbers, spaces, Shift, and Caps Lock. Type this sentence exactly, capital letters, commas, and all: Hi Doctor Digital! Are you having a good day today? Thanks for teaching me like 9,003,751 new things!

playgroundTask.instructions: Type exactly: Hi Doctor Digital! Are you having a good day today? Thanks for teaching me like 9,003,751 new things!
playgroundTask.targetText: Hi Doctor Digital! Are you having a good day today? Thanks for teaching me like 9,003,751 new things!

drDigitalSuccess: Perfect typing! Capitals, numbers, punctuation — you nailed every part.
drDigitalHint: Match it exactly: capital H, D, and D, the commas inside 9,003,751, and the ! and ? marks. Use Shift for the capitals and symbols.
